title: Friendship Decay and EML-3 Maintenance

analysis.object: T607: Friendship Decay and EML-3 Maintenance depth analysis

new_friendship_eml1.description: New friendship intensity: EML-1 exponential growth in first months
new_friendship_eml1.reason: New friendship is EML-1: exponential novelty, dopamine, shared experience accumulation

maintained_eml3.description: Maintained friendship: EML-3 oscillatory contact pattern
maintained_eml3.reason: Sustained friendship is EML-3: rhythmic reaching out, responding, reciprocating

lapsed_eml1.description: Lapsed friendship: EML-1 exponential decay without EML-3 maintenance
lapsed_eml1.reason: Friendship decay is EML-1: exponential forgetting curve without contact reinforcement

acquaintance_vs_lifelong.description: Lifelong friend = relationship reached EML-3 before EML-1 decay took over
acquaintance_vs_lifelong.reason: Friendship theorem: EML-3 threshold must be reached before decay; otherwise acquaintance only

analysis.theorem: T607: Friendship Decay and EML-3 Maintenance (S886).

key_theorem: T607: Friendship Decay and EML-3 Maintenance (S886).
